programme.title: O ano é 1938. Em uma ruína mexicana, diversas máscaras de pedra são descobertas. Na cidade de Nova York, um jovem chamado Smokey recebe a ajuda de Joseph, o neto de JoJo.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Joseph enfrenta Straizo, que virou vampiro após trair seu amigo Speedwagon. Terminada a batalha, Straizo avisa sobre o Homem do Pilar.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Joseph é atacado por um dos homens de Stroheim na chegada ao México. Stroheim tenta despertar Santviento, o Homem do Pilar.

programme.title: Joseph usa seu poder para tentar fugir de Santviento. Quando isso não dá certo, ele tenta expor seu inimigo à luz do sol para se salvar.

programme.title: Joseph e Speedwagon conhecem Caesar, neto de Zeppeli, quando chegam a Roma após a descoberta de que existem outros Homens do Pilar.

programme.title: O Homem do Pilar Wamuu fere Caesar Zeppeli durante uma luta feroz. Joseph revela a nova técnica que desenvolveu em segredo.

programme.title: Caesar leva Joseph até Veneza para conhecer sua mentora Lisa Lisa, que começa a treiná-lo com rigor para aprender a controlar seus poderes.

programme.title: Lisa Lisa diz a Joseph que ele precisa da pedra chamada Super Aja para destruir os Homens do Pilar. Joseph e Caesar enfrentam outros mestres.

programme.title: Caesar chega ao esconderijo do inimigo, e agora ele tem um novo tipo de ataque. Lisa Lisa revela seu passado a Joseph.

programme.title: Lisa Lisa e Joseph descobrem que Wamuu e Kars esperam por eles no hotel com uma centena de vampiros aliados, e ela elabora um plano inteligente para tirá-los dali.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Em uma arena antiga, Joseph e Wamuu disputam uma corrida de bigas até a morte. Mesmo escolhendo a primeira arma, Joseph se vê em uma situação perigosa.

programme.title: Joseph usa a bandana de Caesar para se defender do ataque final de Wamuu. Lisa Lisa desafia Kars para um combate nas ruínas do templo.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Joseph tenta impedir que Lisa Lisa sofra uma queda mortal. Speedwagon revela detalhes sobre o passado de Lisa Lisa.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Kars surge da lava derretida e ataca Joseph, que instintivamente segura a Pedra Vermelha para se proteger dos golpes do inimigo.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jotaro e seus aliados viajam até Singapura pelo mar. Um Stand com usuário desconhecido ataca Jotaro assim que um passageiro clandestino é encontrado no navio.

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Tudo pela Honra, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: O habilidoso espadachim e mulherengo Fanfan La Tulipe é obrigado a se juntar ao exército do rei Luís XV pela trambiqueira Adeline La Franchise , que o convence dizendo que assim se casará com uma das filhas do rei.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The secret of the Ooze, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Tartarugas Ninja buscam novo lar nos esgotos de Nova York e enfrentam o Destruidor, que usa o Ooze para criar capangas. Com ajuda de April, Jordan e Keno, precisam detê-lo.

programme.title: O Caçador de Dragões, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Depois que o pai de Will é morto por um dragão, ele embarca em uma jornada épica para se vingar do monstro .

programme.title: Batalha dos Impérios, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China.

programme.title: Missão Quase Impossível, (2010, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. espião Bob Ho assume sua tarefa mais difícil até hoje: cuidar dos três filhos de sua namorada, que não gostaram muito do namorado de sua mãe.

programme.title: Tudo pela Honra, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: O habilidoso espadachim e mulherengo Fanfan La Tulipe é obrigado a se juntar ao exército do rei Luís XV pela trambiqueira Adeline La Franchise , que o convence dizendo que assim se casará com uma das filhas do rei.

programme.title: Crônicas da Tribo Fantasma, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Quando fósseis gigantes são descobertos perto da Mongólia, uma expedição é organizada para analisá-los. Quando uma explosão deixa os membros da equipe de escavação enterrados no subsolo, eles descobrem um templo ciclópico e bestas gigantes antigas.

programme.title: O Mito, (2005, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: O arqueólogo Jack continua tendo sonhos recorrentes de uma vida passada, onde ele é o grande general Meng Yi, que jurou proteger uma princesa chamada Ok-Soo. Jack decide ir investigar tudo com seu amigo William.

programme.title: Merlin E O Livro Das Bestas, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Bem-vindo ao lado sombrio de Camelot: o Rei Arthur se foi. A Távola Redonda está em ruínas. E um feiticeiro corrupto desencadeou um reinado de terror monstruoso sobre a terra.

programme.title: Dupla em Fúria, (2013, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Uma onda de assassinatos sacode Hong Kong. O jovem detetive Wang Bu Er tem certeza de que eles são o trabalho de um assassino em sériee, junto com Huang Fei Hong, um mestre do kung, eles empreendem uma aventura em ritmo acelerado para investigar o caso.

programme.title: Sangue Oposto, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Dmitri e James, dois poderosos assassinos de elite contratados pelo governo, se reconectam após seu último trabalho no Sudeste Asiático.

programme.title: Impacto Mortal, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Um lutador francês enfrenta gangues em Los Angeles para proteger uma família local.

programme.title: Perseguição Explosiva, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Um dublê se envolve acidentalmente em crimes envolvendo relíquias misteriosas e agora precisa lutar para sobreviver ao longo de uma série de aventuras perigosas e incríveis.

programme.title: Aliança Mortal, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um grande carregamento de drogas desaparece entre a fronteira Canadá-Estados Unidos. Os traficantes de drogas que o procuram obrigam um guarda florestal, um ex-membro das Forças Especiais, a ajudá-los a encontrar a droga.

programme.title: Hitman - O Rei dos Assassinos, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Um antigo chefe da máfia japonesa suspeita de ser vítima de um ataque e deixa uma recompensa para a pessoa que encontrar o seu assassino.

programme.title: Bodyguard - Resgate de Risco, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Um especialista em artes marciais entra para trabalhar como guarda-costas para a filha de um rico homem de negócios. A empresa de segurança, propriedade de um velho amigo do combatente, esconde um plano de poder obscuro.

programme.title: O Monge à Prova de Balas, (2020, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Baseado em uma história em quadrinhos "underground", ele conta a história de um monge tibetano imortal -Chow- que se torna o mentor de um jovem menino de rua -Scott-, a quem ele ensina a proteger um velho pergaminho que o monge cuidou durante anos.

programme.title: O Duelo Final, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Uma ex-lutadora relutantemente retorna à vida que ela abandonou para ajudar sua irmã a sobreviver ao mundo sádico das lutas ilegais e do maníaco que o comanda.

programme.title: Era uma vez na China e na América, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: Jet Li é Wong Fei-Hong, herói chinês que vai à América, é salvo por índios e luta contra a exploração de trabalhadores chineses por um tirano local.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard, (1950, Drama)
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot, (1959, Comedy)
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: Ace in the Hole, (1951, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Great Dictator, (1940, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told, (1965, Faith & Spirituality)
programme.desc: Max Von Sydow, John Wayne, Charlton Heston, Sidney Poitier, and Shelley Winters head an all-star cast in this lavish portrayal of the life of Jesus from legendary director George Stevens. This stunning epic truly is The Greatest Story Ever Told.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice, (1954, Comedy)
programme.desc: Widower Henry Hobson is a successful bootmaker and a tyrannical father of three daughters who all want to leave him by getting married, but he refuses because marriage traditions require him to pay out settlements.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit, (1945, Best of British Humor)
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are haunted by the ghost of his first wife.

programme.title: Brief Encounter, (1945, Drama)
programme.desc: Meeting a stranger in a railway station, a woman is tempted to cheat on her husband.

programme.title: Cliffhanger, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: This gripping action-adventure tale features Sylvester Stallone as a member of the Rocky Mountain Rescue Team, still grieving over his inability to prevent a friend from falling to her death.

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: One More Shot, (2024, Action)
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union address.

programme.title: Hyena Road, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: Three men, three different paths, caught in conflict but brought together to save lives: a highly skilled sniper who can’t think of his targets as human, an intelligence officer who has never killed while on duty.

programme.title: Windtalkers, (2002, War Drama)
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Triple 9, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: When a bank-robbing crew of corrupt cops and ex-Special Forces must attempt a nearly impossible heist for a ruthless mobster, their only hope of survival is to distract the entire Atlanta police force with a “999” — cop code for “officer down.”

programme.title: The Contractor, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: After being involuntarily discharged from the Marines, James Reed joins a paramilitary organization in order to support his family.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer, (1997, Horror)
programme.desc: After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. But exactly one year later, the dead man returns from his watery grave, and he's looking for more than an apology.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer, (1998, Horror)
programme.desc: Remember Ben Willis? He's the fisherman who killed the boy who was driving the car when it went off the road in the fatal accident that killed his daughter, Sara... he's the man in the slicker with a hook in his hand... well, he's back.

programme.title: Disturbing Behavior, (1998, Thriller)
programme.desc: When the Clark Family moves from Chicago to Cradle Bay, Steve is cautioned by Gavin Strick about the separating factions at the local high school, where the Blue Ribbons, a club of robotic perfect students, rule.

programme.title: May, (2003, Horror)
programme.desc: May grew up as a lonely oddball whose only friend was a perfectly kept doll. When she moves to L.A., she takes up with a handsome filmmaker and then an alluring lesbian, but every connection she makes turns out deadly.

programme.title: We Summon the Darkness, (2020, Horror)
programme.desc: A post-concert party at a remote country mansion turns into a grisly satanic slaughter scene in this dark-humored horror-thriller starring Alexandra Daddario and Johnny Knoxville.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw, (1970, Horror)
programme.desc: A young woman inherits an isolated mansion from a distant relative, but an unspeakable horror awaits her in the mansion's dank cellars.

programme.title: Hell Fest, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: A serial killer in costume at a Halloween theme park kills off visitors, unbeknownst to bystanders who think it's part of the fun.

programme.title: Hex, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Following a mysterious disappearance on a jump, a group of skydivers experience paranormal occurrences that leave them fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Down a Dark Hall, (2018, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on Lois Duncan's young adult thriller, story follows Kit Gordy, a new student at Blackwood Boarding School, who must unlock the mysteries of the school's tragic past.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The curtains are down on his skirmish with Secco, but Bucciarati must race against time to reach the Colosseum as he realizes his body is nearing the end of the line. Unfortunately, he’s not the only one who catches on to his deteriorating condition.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon departs on a journey to take the Hunter Exam and meets Leorio and Kurapika who also want to be Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: If Gon, Leorio and Kurapika cannot answer an old woman's question correctly, they will be immediately disqualified.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Escorted by the Kiriko the trio finally arrive at the exam site.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The exam for the First Phase consists of following Satotz, the proctor to the site of the Second Phase.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: Death Note: Execution
programme.desc: After fifty days of confinement the killings continue, and Misa and Light are released.

programme.title: Death Note: Ally
programme.desc: Though L is still suspicious, Light and Misa, their memories of being Kira wiped clean, return to headquarters .

programme.title: Death Note: Matsuda
programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Death Note: Makeshift
programme.desc: L's team discovers that the Yotsuba Group meet in secret to discuss the elimination of individuals who are troublesome to their company .

programme.title: Death Note: Performance
programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: No sooner than Bruno and team set foot on the shore near Rome the team finds a flesh-eating mold devouring everyone in sight. It's the work of Cioccolata, made worse by his partner Secco, who records the tortured faces of his victims to be viewed later.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Branching off from Bruno, who opts to tackle the underground swimmer Secco, Giorno and Mista chase Cioccolata as he flies to spread rotten ruin upon Rome. Their battles unfold in front of a mystery ally silently awaiting their arrival at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: One fierce battle ends in Cioccolata’s defeat, but another unfolds after Secco listens to Cioccolata’s revealing final voicemail. Bucciarati sinks into an intense underground struggle to stop Secco from reaching the secret stationed at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The curtains are down on his skirmish with Secco, but Bucciarati must race against time to reach the Colosseum as he realizes his body is nearing the end of the line. Unfortunately, he’s not the only one who catches on to his deteriorating condition.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Key to defeating the Boss in hand, Polnareff waits for Bucciarati and crew. But the one who appears before him first is none other than the Boss of the Passione himself, Diavolo. The tides may not be the only things shifting in the battle yet to come.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Pierced by the arrow, Silver Chariot transforms into Chariot Requiem, its new power swapping the souls of all living creatures nearby. Realizing the dangers of the arrow in the wrong hands, Giorno and crew scramble to get ahold of it before Diavolo does.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Grotesque disfigurations begin to emerge from the soul-swapped bodies as Chariot Requiem’s frenzy rages on. Bucciarati and crew need to take back the arrow and fast. However, Giorno has a terrifying revelation, stopping everyone in their tracks.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Solving the mystery of Requiem, Diavolo takes control of Trish’s soul and steals the arrow. Attacks do nothing against Emperor Crimson’s time leaps and Eulogy’s predictions. But just as Diavolo is about to pierce his own Stand with the arrow...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Righteous actions born of truth shall never be destroyed. Piercing Golden Wind with the arrow, Giorno draws the final battle against Diavolo to a close. And Diavolo, robbed of the mercy of death, spirals violently into an “end” that never ends.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Months before meeting Giorno, Bucciarati and gang help a local florist chisel out the truth behind his daughter’s apparent suicide. Mista is assigned to track down her lover, whose ties with destiny had unwittingly cast a light upon Bucciarati’s fate.

programme.desc: Netero challenges Gon and Killua to a simple game. If they win, they earn the right to become Hunters.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven, (2016, Western)
programme.desc: Director Antoine Fuqua brings his modern vision to the classic western, a story of seven outlaws who join together to save a town from an evil industrialist! Denzel Washington, Chris Pratt, Ethan Hawke and Vincent D'Onofrio and Peter Sarsgaard star!

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn, (1989, Thriller)
programme.desc: Xavier Quinn is the police chief of a tiny Caribbean island. He is on good terms with all. When a prominent businessman is murdered, Quinn, like everyone else, believes that the killer is Maubee--a local folk hero and Quinn's childhood friend.

programme.title: Flight, (2012, Drama)
programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: Flight, (2012, Drama)
programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: Missing in Action, (1984, Action)
programme.desc: American servicemen are still being held captive in Vietnam – and it's up to one man to bring them home in this blistering, fast-paced action/adventure starring martial arts superstar Chuck Norris.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: Chuck Norris returns as James Braddock in this action-packed prequel to the original hit film. As war rages in Vietnam, Braddock and his men are captured and imprisoned. With fists and sheer courage, he must become an army of one to save his men.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing In Action III, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: When Colonel James Braddock (Chuck Norris, "Missing in Action") is told that his wife and 12-year-old son are still alive in Communist Vietnam, he mounts a one-man assault to free them…armed with the latest high-tech firepower, of course!

programme.title: Code of Silence, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a stakeout marred by mob interference results in the death of an innocent bystander and a police cover-up, a Chicago detective is forced to adhere to his own personal code of ethics in an effort to rid the Windy City of its Warring crime factions.

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A., (1985, Action)
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov catches America unprepared and makes it a war zone from sea to shining sea. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter.

programme.title: The Delta Force, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage, and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Firewalker, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Two hapless soldiers of misfortune (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) meet a beautiful girl (Melody Anderson) with a map to a lost gold mine and decide to have one last shot at striking it rich. But the trail to the treasure is no yellow brick road!

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2, (2015, Comedy)
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy, and the Barden Bellas compete in the World Championships of A Cappella after a scandal threatens their legacy.

programme.title: The House Bunny, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: When Shelley gets kicked out of the mansion, she's lost in the wilds of Beverly Hills until she stumbles upon the sorriest sorority on campus. Now it's up to her to spruce up the girls and heat up the Zeta house before the University shuts them down.

programme.title: The Love Guru, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: A hilarious comedy starring Mike Myers as guru Pitka in his first original character since the blockbuster hit Austin Powers.

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon and Walter Matthau portray lifelong feuding neighbors making each day a hilarious game of revenge. But then voluptuous Ariel moves in nearby and their dormant hormones reignite in an all-out competition to win her favor.

programme.title: Grumpier Old Men, (1995, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this sequel to Grumpy Old Men, a vivacious Italian beauty attempts to convert Wabasha, Minnesota's cherished bait store into a romantic Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: If you've always wanted to know what a baby thinks of the world around him, you finally have your chance. With Bruce Willis supplying the voice of Mikey's thoughts, this is one baby who says exactly what's on his mind. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Footloose, (1984, Romance)
programme.desc: A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Grease 2, (1982, Musical)
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Pretty In Pink, (1986, Romance)
programme.desc: She’s a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He’s the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it’s threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Valley Girl, (1983, Romance)
programme.desc: When Valley Girl Julie (Deborah Foreman) dumps her preppy boyfriend, she unexpectedly finds love with rocker Randy (Nicolas Cage)...much to the dismay of her valley girlfriends who find Julie's punk hunk to be "grody to the max!" Fer Shure.

programme.title: Strictly Ballroom, (1992, Romance)
programme.desc: A championship ballroom dancer finds inspiration within, and decides he'll stop at nothing to win, even if it means rewriting the rules. A worldwide feel-good hit, with an incredible soundtrack, from director Baz Luhrmann (MOULIN ROUGE!).

programme.title: Footloose, (1984, Romance)
programme.desc: A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.

programme.title: Benny & Joon, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic Drama about two misfits who Comedye together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Pretty In Pink, (1986, Romance)
programme.desc: She’s a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He’s the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it’s threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Along Came A Spider, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: After the harrowing death of his partner, detective and best-selling author Alex Cross has retreated to the peace of retirement. But when a brilliant criminal (Michael Wincott) kidnaps a senator’s young daughter, Alex is lured back into action.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction, (1987, Drama)
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: Kiss the Girls, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: Eight kidnapped women. All beautiful. All talented. All in danger of having their lives cut cruelly short if police detective Alex Cross and key witness Kate McTiernan can’t locate the elusive “collector” who calls himself Casanova.

programme.title: Along Came A Spider, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: After the harrowing death of his partner, detective and best-selling author Alex Cross has retreated to the peace of retirement. But when a brilliant criminal (Michael Wincott) kidnaps a senator’s young daughter, Alex is lured back into action.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction, (1987, Drama)
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Forrest Gump, (1994, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Dreamland, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Romance)
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: The Illusionist, (2019, Thriller)
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Vienna, a magician uses his abilities to secure the love of a woman far above his social standing.

programme.title: Short Term 12, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Short Term 12 follows Grace (Brie Larson), a twenty-something staff member at a foster care facility as she reckons with caring for the teens in her charge and her own past. This lovingly realized film finds truth and humor in unexpected places.

programme.title: Mermaids, (1990, Romance)
programme.desc: A sexy and unpredictable single mother of two is a source of constant embarrassment to her confused 15-year-old daughter, who's trying to deal with her own sexual awakening.

programme.title: Dreamland, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Young Guns, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Young Guns II, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: The West has changed since The Regulators last rode through. Cornered by the ruthless cattle kings and double-crossed by corrupt government officials, Billy the Kid leads the Regulators down a treacherous trail towards Old Mexico… and destiny.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: An American legend comes to life in this epic Western starring Jason Patric, Robert Duvall, Gene Hackman and Wes Studi as Geronimo, giving a stunning performance as the fearless warrior who was the last Indian leader to surrender to the white man.

programme.title: The Long Riders, (1980, Western)
programme.desc: Four theatrical families of the 1980s re-create the saga of the 1860s James Gang: Stacy and James Keach, David, Keith and Robert Carradine, Randy and Dennis Quaid and Christopher and Nicholas Guest.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Posse, (1993, Western)
programme.desc: There's action galore in this off-beat western that features a group of mostly black infantrymen who return from the Spanish-American War with a cache of gold. The men travel to the West where their leader searches for the men who lynched his father.

programme.title: Billy the Kid, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter kills a member of an outlaw gang, all Hell breaks loose in this shoot-‘em-up tale of gun smoke and justice in the Old West.

programme.title: Ephraim's Rescue, (2013, Faith & Spirituality)
programme.desc: By listening to and following his heart, Ephraim Hanks finds his way in life and eventually provides relief and rescue to the suffering Martin Handcart Company. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun, (2015, Western)
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: In the sequel, the OSS now has a full child-spy section and our hero siblings Carmen and Juni Cortez have become agents. On a mission to recover a dangerous device that threatens the entire world, they enlist the skills of their family.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alexa Vega, and Daryl Sabara return in this third installment of the popular SPY KIDS trilogy that finds Carmen kidnapped by an evil Toymaker (Sylvester Stallone) and imprisoned inside a virtual reality game.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters, (2022, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Young Charlie Kincaid, who discovers a secret headquarters under his home that seems to belong to a superhero. He shares it with his friends, and they start to believe that his estranged father might have a secret double life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014), (2013, Action)
programme.desc: When NY City is in trouble, it’s up to the four ninja-fighting, pizza-loving brothers to save it. Aided by determined reporter April O’Neil and their wise master Splinter, these unlikely heroes must face their ultimate nemesis - the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem, (2023, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The Turtle brothers take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: They are G.I. Joe, a top-secret elite strike force featuring the best operatives from around the globe. After the evil Cobra steals a secret weapon, the G.I. Joes must stop Cobra from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: The greatest American Heroes are back, and they've been set up to take the fall for a heinous crime they didn't commit. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) leads a new team (including Channing Tatum and Bruce Willis) on this high-octane adventure.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon and Walter Matthau portray lifelong feuding neighbors making each day a hilarious game of revenge. But then voluptuous Ariel moves in nearby and their dormant hormones reignite in an all-out competition to win her favor.

programme.title: Grumpier Old Men, (1995, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this sequel to Grumpy Old Men, a vivacious Italian beauty attempts to convert Wabasha, Minnesota's cherished bait store into a romantic Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Last Vegas, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Four lifelong best friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days. Upon arriving, they quickly realize that the decades have transformed Sin City and tested their friendship in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life, (2005, Drama)
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.title: Nobody's Fool, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: Paul Newman earned an Oscar nomination plus Best Actor honors from the National Society of Film Critics and New York Film Critics Circle for his portrayal of Sully, a likeable working stiff whos made a lifetime of bad decisions.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand, (2023, Drama)
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: We Own the Night, (2007, Thriller)
programme.desc: What if your own family stood in the way of everything you worked for? Bobby Green (Joaquin Phoenix) has forsaken his name to escape his family and their tradition in law enforcement to pursue his ambitions as a Brooklyn nightclub owner. Rated R

programme.title: Forrest Gump, (1994, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Big, (1988, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this heartfelt comedy starring Tom Hanks, a young boy discovers adulthood isn't all it's cracked up to be when his wish to be a grown-up magically comes true.

programme.title: Barbarella, (1968, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The setting is the planet Lythion in the year 40,000, when Barbarella makes a forced landing while traveling through space. She vanquishes evil in the forms of robots and monsters. She also rewards the handsome men who assist her in the adventure.

programme.title: The Beast With A Million Eyes, (1955, Science fiction)
programme.desc: An unspeakable horror! Extraterrestrial terror is on the hunt for human flesh in this horrifying tale of invasion! This is a 1950s creature-feature with some serious sociological bite! Paul Birch, Lorna Thayer, and Richard Sargent star!

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum, (1961, Horror)
programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: The War of the Worlds, (1953, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Gene Barry and Ann Robinson are among the humans intrigued when a meteor-like object crashes to Earth … but its occupants are definitely not friendly.

programme.title: Barbarella, (1968, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The setting is the planet Lythion in the year 40,000, when Barbarella makes a forced landing while traveling through space. She vanquishes evil in the forms of robots and monsters. She also rewards the handsome men who assist her in the adventure.

programme.title: Carnival of Souls (In Color), (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A world where the difference between the living and the dead is impossible to discern. In Vibrant Color! A true cult classic by director Herk Harvey.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead (1968), (1998, Horror)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a bloodthirsty, flesh-eating breed of monsters who are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum, (1961, Horror)
programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: The War of the Worlds, (1953, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Gene Barry and Ann Robinson are among the humans intrigued when a meteor-like object crashes to Earth … but its occupants are definitely not friendly.

programme.title: Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark, (2019, Horror)
programme.desc: A group of teens must solve a deadly mystery in this film inspired by one of the most terrifying book series of all time, and produced by Oscar® winner Guillermo del Toro.

programme.title: The Haunting In Connecticut, (2009, Horror)
programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia, (2013, Horror)
programme.desc: When a family moves from the city to a centuries-old house in rural Georgia, they are terrorized by malicious spirits seeking revenge.

programme.title: Cobweb, (2023, Horror)
programme.desc: Peter confides in his parents (Lizzy Caplan, Antony Starr) about mysterious tapping in his bedroom wall, but they say it’s just an old house. As his fear grows, so do his doubts.

programme.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer, (2017, Thriller)
programme.desc: A renowned surgeon (Colin Farrell), and his wife (Nicole Kidman) are terrorized by a depraved teenager determined to take revenge for a fatal mistake.

programme.title: Alone, (2020, Horror)
programme.desc: During a global pandemic, a man must battle swarming hordes of the undead to rescue a female neighbor. This zombie horror tale stars Tyler Posey, Summer Spiro, and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: Exists, (2014, Horror)
programme.desc: A camping trip becomes a blood-soaked nightmare as five friends are terrorized by a mysterious creature seeking vengeance.

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: The story takes place in modern day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen year old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.title: Catacombs, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: Horror unfolds when a naïve American makes her first trip to Paris and is invited to an underground rave party in the city's catacombs.

programme.title: Harlem Nights, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Purple Rain, (1983, Musical)
programme.desc: Rock star Prince makes a spectacular feature film debut in this highly autobiographical blockbuster that won both an Oscar and a Grammy award.

programme.title: The Last Dragon, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable hero, Leroy, who aspires to become a kung fu master. Though black and living in Harlem with his family, Leroy lives like a Chinese. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.desc: Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.

programme.title: Island In The Sky, (1953, Thriller)
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole, (1951, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Gambler, (2013, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: Revolver, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.

programme.title: Uncut Gems, (2019, Drama)
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Gambler, (2013, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete, (2019, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two embittered police detectives (Mel Gibson and Vince Vaughn) descend into the criminal underworld and find more than they wanted waiting in the shadows.

programme.title: Hoodlum, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Witness, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Election, (1999, Political Comedies)
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.

programme.title: In & Out, (1997, Comedy)
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: I Love You, Man, (2009, Comedy)
programme.desc: A friendless groom-to-be meets the ultimate dude and the two begin a "bro-mance" which takes male-bonding to hilarious new heights that will keep you laughing to the end.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet, (1993, Drama)
programme.desc: A Chinese Yuppie living in New York who decides that a marriage of convenience is the perfect way to prevent his parents back in Taiwan from discovering he is gay. But his plan backfires when his parents insist on coming to New York for the wedding.

programme.title: Ghost World, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: Passport to Paris, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Twins from California embark on a whirlwind rendezvous with adventure. They shop at Parisian boutiques, visit the Cathedral of Notre Dame, and dine at the Eiffel Tower. The pair even finds time to help their grandpa with official ambassadorial business.

programme.title: New York Minute, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: On the way to a crucial college interview, disciplined, tidy Jane is thwarted by her free-spirited, impulsive, untidy sister Roxy, prompting an unfortunate series of mishaps that almost ruin everything.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: Harriet M. Welsch is probably the world’s most accomplished 11-year-old spy. Harriet dreams of being a writer, and her nanny and best friend, Golly, told her to start by writing down everything she sees.

programme.title: Billboard Dad, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: To cheer up their widowed father, a workaholic artist named Max, Tess and Emily Tyler take out a personal ad on a Los Angeles billboard. Although Max receives an overwhelming number of responses, magic strikes when he meets Brooke Anders.

programme.title: Semi-Tough, (1977, Comedy)

programme.title: North Dallas Forty, (1979, Comedy)
programme.desc: In a society in which major league sporting events have replaced Sunday worship as the religion of choice, North Dallas Forty appears like a desecration at the altar.

programme.desc: John Travolta performs as the troubled Tony Manero - Brooklyn paint store clerk by day and undisputed king of the dance floor by night. A powerful and provocative urban tragedy that carries as much significance today as it did in 1977.

programme.title: Foxy Brown, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: A gang hijacks a subway train and threaten to kill the hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: Gone In 60 Seconds, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: Buckle-up as Eleanor, the fast and furious Ford Fastback Mustang, takes you on a full-throttle ride you'll never forget. The Assignment: To steal 48 muscle and exotic cars! The Challenge: Avoid getting caught!

programme.title: The End, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: When Sonny (Burt Reynolds) is diagnosed with a fatal disease, he swallows a bottle of pills to end it all! Instead, he ends up in a loony bin beside the demented Marlon (Dom DeLuise) who is eager to help Sonny succeed...one madcap attempt at a time!

programme.desc: Jaden's duel against Jesse continues as we learn the origins of Jesse's mysterious Crystal Beast cards.
programme.sub-title: A Jewel of a Duel, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Syrus is kidnapped by Duel Academy's new bad boy Axel Brodie, and only Jaden can save him… by dueling Axel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden's duel against Axel continues as Syrus's life hangs by a thread… literally!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Strange electromagnetic waves ignite Hassleberry's animal instincts as he battles Jim Cook and his pet crocodile Shirley!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Furious that he's no longer the richest kid in school, Chazz challenges billionaire Adrian Gecko to a duel in the sky!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: With his powerful deck of cloud monsters, Adrian Gecko takes Chazz by storm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: While searching for Viper, Jaden encounters a former teacher who has one final test for him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden and Professor Stein's duel continues as Jaden tries to stay awake to learn one last lesson.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jesse and Jaden are on the hunt for Viper… until Jesse's Crystal Beasts become the hunted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jesse's duel against Trapper continues as Jesse fights to free his Crystal Beasts from Trapper's traps!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Professor Viper raises the stakes by forcing Jaden to duel on a tower where the only way down is a 20-story drop!
programme.sub-title: A Snake in the Grass, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden continues his duel with Viper, but in a swamp full of serpents and snakes, will he be able to find victory?
programme.sub-title: A Snake in the Grass, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: It's now or never as Jaden tries to defeat Viper and his snakes before they swallow up Jaden's life points for good.
programme.sub-title: A Snake in the Grass, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden and his friends find themselves in a different dimension where duel monsters are real, the ocean is a sea of sand and... Wait, class is still in session?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: After one of their classmates becomes ill, the gang ventures off to find a deserted submarine in the desert. Can they find what they're looking for, or is someone out to sink their plans before they get there?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: As an army of Duel Ghouls slowly takes over Duel Academy, can Jaden and his friends figure out a way to duel these ghouls, or will they all get schooled in the process?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: It's an all-out battle with the Duel Ghouls as Jaden tries to get Blair the medicine she needs. Will she get the first aid in time, or have the Duel Ghouls prescribed a different kind of treatment for her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: When three rogue students go looking for food, they end up biting off more than they can chew. And when Jaden gets challenged, it soon becomes a battle with triple the action, triple the duels, and triple the danger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: With Jesse, Jim, and Axel facing off against three masked duelists, there's no telling what might happen. It's an all-out battle where the winners get their just desserts and the losers just get hungry!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden finally confronts the student formally known as Marcel. But before Jaden can find out who's who, a roaring rumble begins to unravel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: As Jaden tries to stop the Three Sacred Beasts from being released, a battle for the beasts begins as Adrian Gecko decides to go for the cards himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: It's a duel between two dimensions as Zane and Jesse square off in a back-and-forth battle to get back home.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: As Jesse sets his sights on recovering the legendary Rainbow Dragon, Jaden finds himself dueling an unfamiliar friend whose sights are set on revenge.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: It's all or nothing as Jesse and Jaden team up against an enemy from Jaden's past. Can Jesse's Rainbow Dragon lead them to victory, or will their opponent's deck slay this ultimate beast and any hopes they have of getting back home?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Most of the students have returned from the alternate universe only to find that a few of their friends were left behind. Full of guilt, Jaden concocts a dangerous plan to get them back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Having agreed to go find Jesse, Jaden and the gang find themselves journeying through a strange dark world where getting your game on involves risking more than just your life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: The search for Jesse continues as Jaden battles a fiend named Scarr. Can Jaden defeat this member of the Dark Army, or will this duel send him to the stars?

programme.title: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy in Big Trouble! Fishmen vs. the Luffy Pirates!

programme.title: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Submerged! Zoro vs. Hatchan the Octopus!

programme.title: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Proud Warriors! Sanji and Usopp's Fierce Battles!

programme.title: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy at Full Power! Nami's Determination and the Straw Hat!

programme.title: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Explosion! Fishman Arlong's Fierce Assault From the Sea!

programme.title: Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: End of the Fishman Empire! Nami's My Friend!

programme.title: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Setting Out with a Smile! Farewell, Hometown Cocoyashi Village!

programme.title: Finally, the day has arrived where Luffy’s face is on an authentic wanted poster! Now there are enemies in hot pursuit as the crew makes waves for Logue Town – the final resting place of Gold Roger!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bounty! Straw Hat Luffy Becomes Known to the World!

programme.title: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Chase Straw Hat! Little Buggy's Big Adventure!

programme.title: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Wait is Over! The Return of Captain Buggy!

programme.title: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Town of the Beginning and the End! Landfall at Logue Town!

programme.title: Luffy has a run-in with Captain Smoker, and his failure to keep a low profile helps Buggy draw a bead on him. Elsewhere, Zoro takes a chance that his skill can overcome a dangerous curse.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Kitetsu III and Yubashiri! Zoro's New Swords and the Woman Sergeant Major!

programme.title: Usopp finds an amazing pair of sharpshooter’s goggles, but they lead to a run-in with Daddy the Parent – the greatest gunslinger ever! Now, the Straw Hat marksman is headed for the deadliest of all duels.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Usopp vs. Daddy the Parent! Showdown at High!

programme.title: A cooking competition with the fiery chef Carmen rekindles Sanji’s dreams of the legendary All Blue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fiery Cooking Battle? Sanji vs. the Beautiful Chef!

programme.title: Buggy and his mysterious female ally trap Luffy on the same platform where Gold Roger was executed. He is to be killed for his offenses against Buggy, but Zoro and Sanji attempt a daring rescue mission.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Buggy's Revenge! The Man Who Smiles On the Execution Platform!

programme.title: As a storm batters Logue Town, Buggy, Alvida, and Captain Smoker close in on Luffy for a stirring final showdown!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legend Has Started! Head for the Grand Line!

programme.title: The discovery of a small girl adrift in an abandoned lifeboat interrupts Luffy and his crew’s voyage to the Grand Line.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Precursor to a New Adventure! Apis, a Mysterious Girl!

programme.title: After escaping the clutches of the Marine fleet, the Straw Hats soon find themselves in an equally dangerous predicament – stranded in the Calm Belt!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Miraculous Creature! Apis's Secret and The Legendary Island!

programme.title: The Straw Hats want to return Apis’s dragon to his nest, but the Marines have them surrounded. Looks like it’s time for another daring escape!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Eric Attacks! Great Escape from Warship Island!

programme.title: Even for Nami, finding the dragon’s lost island proves to be tougher than looking for a needle in a haystack – or at the bottom of the ocean.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Solitary Island in the Distant Sea! The Legendary Lost Island!

programme.title: Nami discovers a map to the true location of the dragon’s nest, and Zorro puts his steel to the test against Eric the Whirlwind.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showdown in the Ruins! Tense Zoro vs. Eric!

programme.title: The Straw Hats sail headfirst into Commodore Nelson and his Marine armada. While Luffy, Sanji, and Zoro dodge cannon balls, Eric the Whirlwind prepares a sneak attack!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy, Completely Surrounded! Commodore Nelson's Secret Strategy!

programme.title: With their rescue mission taking on water, the Straw Hats get some surprising help from the great blue yonder.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Through the Sky They Soar! The 1000 Year Legend Lives Again!

programme.title: After unlocking the secrets of the dragon’s nest, Luffy does battle with Eric the Whirlwind to ensure the safety of the island. Don’t mess with the rubberman!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Angry Showdown! Cross the Red Line!

programme.title: The Straw Hat crew takes a wild ride up and down a mountain only to end up in the belly of a giant whale that’s on the lookout for pirates!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The First Line of Defense? The Giant Whale Laboon Appears!

programme.title: Luffy trades blows with Laboon the whale, and Nami is distressed to learn that navigating the Grand Line is no easy feat.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Promise Between Men! Luffy and the Whale Vow to Meet Again!

programme.title: A violent snowstorm batters the crew of the Going Merry, but once the Straw Hats arrive at Whisky Peak, the locals invite them to a raucous celebration.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Town that Welcomes Pirates? Setting Foot on Whisky Peak!

programme.title: There are bounty hunters on the prowl, and most of the Straw Hats are dead drunk. Only Zoro is still sober enough to hoist a sword.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Explosion! The Three Swords Style! Zoro vs. Baroque Works!

programme.title: There’s a mysterious princess that needs protection from a nose-picking assassin, but Luffy and Zoro are too busy duking it out to worry about explosive boogers.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: All-out Battle! Luffy vs. Zoro, Mysterious Grand Duel!

programme.title: The Straw Hats depart Whisky Peak on a mission to return the Princess of Alabasta to her kingdom while protecting her from an army of vicious assassins.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Deliver Princess Vivi! The Luffy Pirates Set Sail!

programme.title: While the crew heads for Little Garden with the princess, Luffy and Zorro’s old nemesis, Axe-Hand Morgan, escapes from a Marine prison ship.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Try Hard, Coby! Coby and Helmeppo's Struggles in the Marines!

programme.title: Colby and Helmeppo train day and night to prove they’re tough enough to be Marines. A violent showdown with Vice-Admiral Garp will determine if they’re worth their salt.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Coby and Helmeppo's Resolve! Vice-Admiral Garp's Parental Affection!

programme.title: Luffy’s gang is running low on supplies, so they stop at Little Garden to find something to eat. Unfortunately for them, it might end up the other way around.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Ancient Island! The Shadow Hiding in Little Garden!

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Super 8, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: The Running Man, (1987, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A wrongly-convicted man must try to survive a public execution gauntlet staged as a TV game show.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Hackers, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven, (1960, Drama)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven, (1966, Drama)
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!, (1972, Drama)
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders have killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: Silver Canyon, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram are sent by the cavalry to bring in raiders who are interfering with supply lines. Gene traces them to a small Army outpost where the outlaws set out to ravage the town.

programme.title: Hills Of Utah, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry returns to the town where his father was murdered and finds a mine owner and cattleman feuding. Things get complicated when a boy dies and the mine owner comes gunning for Gene.

programme.title: Valley Of Fire, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry is the new mayor of a lawless town. He has to rid the town of its gambling king and to import a group of gals to settle the men. Gene must out-gun renegades who want to kidnap the gals.

programme.title: The Toughest Gun In Tombstone, (1958, Drama)
programme.desc: In lawless 1880s Arizona, an undercover captain infiltrates the West's most notorious outlaw gang. Building a ruthless reputation while hiding his true identity, he plays a deadly game of deception to bring down the brutal crew of killers.

programme.title: The Gambler Wore A Gun, (1961, Drama)
programme.desc: A professional gambler purchases a ranch via mail order, only to find it is a front for cattle rustlers.

programme.title: The Kentuckian, (1955, Drama)
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: The Terminal, (2004, Drama)
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: For Kiki (Julia Roberts), being the personal assistant to the beautiful megastar, Gwen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), isn't easy. In fact, it's nearly impossible since the man of her dreams is Eddie (John Cusack), Gwen's estranged husband.

programme.title: Kinky Boots, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Center Stage, (2000, Romance)
programme.desc: The American Ballet Company is not for the fainthearted, it's for the most gifted and beautiful ballet dancers alive. But you'll need more than mere physical prowess and determination to succeed. PG-13

programme.title: Kinky Boots, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Rachel Getting Married, (2008, Drama)
programme.desc: When Kym, returns to the Buchman family home for the wedding of her sister Rachel, she brings a long history of personal crises, family conflict, and tragedy along with her. Rated -R

programme.title: Center Stage, (2000, Romance)
programme.desc: The American Ballet Company is not for the fainthearted, it's for the most gifted and beautiful ballet dancers alive. But you'll need more than mere physical prowess and determination to succeed. PG-13

programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tiger's Eye hatches a plan to capture Pegasus by using a Lemures that can enter other people's shadow and control them from within.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A small fire incident leaves Mamoru's apartment in a total mess, forcing him to stay at Rei's place for the time being.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa bumps into a young man after becoming enthralled in a beautiful illustration book she had Usagi buy for her.
programme.sub-title: Forest of Illusion: A Beautiful Fairy's Invitation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami is shocked when she sees Mamoru coming out of his apartment with another woman.
programme.sub-title: Drive to the Heavens: The Dream Car Fueled with Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa befriends Miharu, who is aiming to be the best swordwoman in Japan.
programme.sub-title: Aiming for the Top: The Pretty Swordswoman's Dilemma

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Yoshiki Usui’s new store opens. Usagi and her friends head out to see the fashion show, along with Fish’s Eye, who is captivated by Usui's good looks.
programme.sub-title: We Love Fashion: The Stylish Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi spots Minako out on a date with a handsome man. To everyone's surprise, the boyfriend is different from the one Usagi saw earlier.
programme.sub-title: Storm of Love: Minako's Grand Two-Timing Plan

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: An old woman named Mayako lives alone in a mansion. Mayako is very distrustful of strangers, believing they are after her wealth and fortune.
programme.sub-title: The Secret Mansion: A Menu of Love for You

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Reports of Pegasus attacking the town cause Usagi and the other Sailor Guardians to have doubts about whether Pegasus can be trusted or not.
programme.sub-title: Believe in Pegasus: The Four Guardians' Super Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends are enjoying their summer vacation by the beach. Shingo is acting as their bodyguard—especially for Ami, whom he has a crush on.
programme.sub-title: Shining Summer Days: Ami Under the Sea-Breeze

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa see an ad for a free ballet lesson and sign up. As they practice, Fish’s Eye draws the class's attention with his dancing skills.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa meet a woman named Rubina who follows them. Rubina is a princess who snuck out to experience life outside of her royal duties.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls attend the school festival. Makoto is asked to dance by a handsome man, who is actually Tiger's Eye in disguise.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Fish's Eye goes after Mamoru. But Mamoru seems to show no interest in being with anyone besides Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Shadow of Evil: The Trio's Last Chance

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Zirconia threatens the Amazon Trio that if they don’t capture Pegasus by the next new moon, the magic making them human will wear off.
programme.sub-title: Mirrors of Dreams: The Amazon's Last Stage

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to see a show at the Dead Moon Circus. But Momo starts acting peculiar and leaves, causing Chibi-Usa to become worried.
programme.sub-title: The Amazoness: Nightmare from Behind the Mirrors

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Circo Esperança, (2022)

programme.title: Servos de Guerra, (1970)

programme.title: Inimiga Perfeita, (1970)

programme.title: Big Kill - A Cidade do Medo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O destino leva um almofadinha da Filadélfia, dois jogadores desajustados em fuga e um religioso assassino a uma cidade em franca expansão chamada Big Kill. A. O que eles encontram no Oeste é uma jornada selvagem e uma luta pela sobrevivência. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Mal Está ao Seu Lado, (1970)

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Robo-Dog, (1970)

programme.title: Uma Aventura e Tanto, (1970)

programme.title: Retroceder Nunca, Render-se Jamais, (1970)

programme.title: Antes de partir, (2018)

programme.title: 2009. Enquanto a cidade está ocupada apontando culpados pela crise econômica, Randy apresenta uma solução para as dificuldades financeiras. programme.title: 2009. Chegou a hora da corrida de pinhos em South Park e Stan e Randy estão trabalhando duro para construir o melhor carro. programme.desc: South Park - T08E02

programme.title: 2004. Cartman estava tentando voar, mas o máximo que conseguiu foi um golpe na cabeça e isso fez com que ele ficasse dois dias em coma. programme.desc: South Park - T09E11

programme.title: 2006. Al Gore visita a escola de South Park e tenta convencer Stan, Kyle, Cartman e Kenny para sair e caçar o perigoso homem-urso-porco. programme.desc: South Park - T10E06

programme.title: 2006. A mãe do Cartman quer encontrar uma maneira de controlar o seu filho. Ela busca ajuda em alguns programas de televisão, mas sem muito sucesso. programme.desc: South Park - T10E07

programme.title: 2006. O senhor Garrison precisa explicar a Teoria da Evolução em aula, mesmo que isso vá totalmente contra os seus valores.
